LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
    type variables:  []
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))
          n : Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}

Agda.Builtin.List.List:
  mutual inductive(s):
    List
    type variables:  [a, A]
      constructors:
        Ֆ5bՖՖ5dՖ (0 arg(s))
        Ֆ_Ֆcons_ (2 arg(s))
          x : @1
          xs : Agda.Builtin.List.List{0} □ @1

Types.listrect:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: [A, P]
    type: □ → □ → @1 → (@0 → Agda.
                             Builtin.
                             List.List{0} □ @0 → @1 → @1) → Agda.Builtin.List.List{0} □ @0 → @1
    body: μrec [0] :=
            0: λ _ _ _ _ _ →
                 case<Agda.Builtin.List.List{0},0> @0 of
                   λ<[]> @2
                   λ<[_, _]> @3 @1 @0 (@7 □ □ @4 @3 @0)

Types.map:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: [A, B]
    type: □ → □ → (@0 → @1) → Agda.Builtin.List.List{0} □ @0 → Agda.
                                                               Builtin.
                                                               List.List{0} □ @1
    body: λ _ _ _ →
            Types.listrect □ □ Agda.Builtin.List.List{0}{0}
              (λ _ _ _ → Agda.Builtin.List.List{0}{1} (@3 @2) @0)

Types.head:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Agda.Builtin.List.List{0} □ (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.
                                                                  Builtin.
                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}
    body: λ _ →
            case<Agda.Builtin.List.List{0},0> @0 of
              λ<[]> Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0}
              λ<[_, _]> @1

Types.sig:
  mutual inductive(s):
    sig
    type variables:  [A, P]
      constructors:
        exist (2 arg(s))
          fst : @0
          snd : □

Types.sig.fst:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: [A, P]
    type: Types.sig{0} @0 □ → @0
    body: λ _ → case<Types.sig{0},0> @0 of λ<[_, _]> @1

Types.test:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: Types.head
            (Types.map □ □
               (λ _ → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1} (Types.sig.fst @0))
               (Agda.Builtin.List.List{0}{1}
                  (Types.sig{0}{0}
                     (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                        (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                           (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                              (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                 (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                    (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                       (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                          (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                             (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                   (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                      (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                         (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                            (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                               (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                  (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                     (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                        (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                           (Agda.
                                                                            Builtin.
                                                                            Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                              (Agda.
                                                                               Builtin.
                                                                               Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                 (Agda.
                                                                                  Builtin.
                                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}{1}

                                                                                     Builtin.
                                                                                     Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                       (Agda.
                                                                                        Builtin.
                                                                                        Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                          (Agda.
                                                                                           Builtin.
                                                                                           Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                             (Agda.
                                                                                              Builtin.
                                                                                              Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                (Agda.
                                                                                                 Builtin.
                                                                                                 Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                   (Agda.
                                                                                                    Builtin.
                                                                                                    Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                      (Agda.
                                                                                                       Builtin.

                                                                                                                Builtin.
                                                                                                                Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                  (Agda.
                                                                                                                   Builtin.
                                                                                                                   Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                     (Agda.
                                                                                                                      Builtin.
                                                                                                                      Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                        (Agda.
                                                                                                                         Builtin.
                                                                                                                         Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                           (Agda.
                                                                                                                            Builtin.
                                                                                                                            Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                              (Agda.
                                                                                                                               Builtin.
                                                                                                                               Nat.Nat{0}{1}

                                                                                                                                     Builtin.
                                                                                                                                     Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                       (Agda.
                                                                                                                                        Builtin.
                                                                                                                                        Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                          (Agda.
                                                                                                                                           Builtin.
                                                                                                                                           Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                             (Agda.
                                                                                                                                              Builtin.
                                                                                                                                              Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                                Agda.
                                                                                                                                                Builtin.
                                                                                                                                                Nat.Nat{0}{0})))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))
                     □)
                  (Agda.Builtin.List.List{0}{1}
                     (Types.sig{0}{0} Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0} □)
                     Agda.Builtin.List.List{0}{0})))

Types.Top.tt:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: □
    body: □

Types.Top:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: □
    body: □

  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: □
    body: □
